allow: Bash(powershell -Command "$lines = Get-Content ''d:\\ThrustC\\src\\thrust.c''; $keep = $lines[0..212] + $lines[450..\($lines.Length-1\)]; Set-Content ''d:\\ThrustC\\src\\thrust.c'' $keep; Write-Host \(''Done. File now has '' + $keep.Length + '' lines''\)")

Bash(powershell -Command "\(Get-Content ''d:\\ThrustC\\src\\thrust.c''\) -replace ''DrawHUD\\\(\\\)'', ''DrawHUD\(gGame.curLevel, gGame.fuel, gGame.lives, gGame.score, gGame.reactor.countdownStarted, gGame.reactor.countdown, gHudTexture\)'' | Set-Content ''d:\\ThrustC\\src\\thrust.c''")
